member.name: Arjun Patel
member.note: Severe peanut allergy, keep auto injectors on hand.

event.title: Board recertification examination
event.detail: Reporting time 8:00 AM, Houston West testing center.

event.title: Diwali celebration
event.detail: Community event at the Hindu Temple of Greater Houston, with a gathering at home in the evening.

event.title: Continuing education credit audit
event.detail: Confirm all recent courses are logged.

event.title: Holi celebration
event.detail: Family day, colors in the afternoon.

event.title: Family dental appointments
event.detail: With the family dentist in Sugar Land.

event.title: Maya annual eye appointment
event.detail: Ophthalmology review at the children's clinic.

recurring.task: Review the family budget with Priya.
Temple visit in the morning, pickup soccer at Briarwood Park.
